title: Sona Sona Sona Lyrics Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga
stanzas: <div>Sona Sona Sona Lyrics Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga

na na na na
break it down like this

vaadi en pakkam konjam vaadi
vaadi adi vekkam vittu vaadi
vaadi vandhu
love ah solli podi ..vaadi

vaadi naan unaketha jodi
vaadi un jaadiketha moodi
vaadi vandhu
mutham onnu thaadi vaadi

sona sona sona
nee en garden-ah
thotti chedi pole
poothaai modern ah

sona sona sona
nee en violin-ah
nenjil indru keten
kadhal dheemthanaa

kadhal konda pen manam
adhu express train ah
waiting list il vaikirai
ennai confirm seivadhu eppodhu

vaadi en pakkam konjam vaadi
vaadi adi vekkam vittu vaadi
vaadi vandhu
love ah solli podi ..vaadi

when you come around
you make me lose my mind
lose my mind girl.
when you come and talk them losing
track of time..
i am losing time girl.

you walk into my life and you
change it girl yo.
one of the kind and
you know it girl yo
you are the girl
my dream girl
you are love of this
life of mine.

single tea-a pola romba
local aana aalu naan
coffee day ah thedi rendu
kaalu pogudhe
mapsal theatre poi kaththi
koochal podum aalu naan
multiplex-u poga
ippo moodu vandhadhu

cellphone-u ringtone
andru dandanakka
adhu unnala maari pochu
carnatic ah
adi innum enna solla
mounam enna kolla

vaadi en pakkam konjam vaadi
vaadi adi vekkam vittu vaadi
vaadi vandhu love ah
solli podi vaadi

vaadi naan unaketha jodi
vaadi un jaadiketha moodi
vaadi vandhu
mutham onnu thaadi vaadi

pechu moochu ninnu pochu
enna konjam paaradi
oxygen ah pola vandhu
kadhal solladi
watch-u mulla pola unna
suthum endhan kaaladi

tab-u screen ah pola enna
touch-u pannadi
egmore-u museum pol
en kaadhal dhaan
adhu solladho
unnapathi varalaru thaan

adi munna pola illa
kadhal enna kolla vaadi

poda nee mokka poda vena
poda enna follow panna venaam
poda over film-u
kaatta venaam podaa

poda enna look-u vida venaam
poda un love-u ellam venaam
poda nee pothikittu
poda podaa

sona sona sona
nee en garden-ah
thotti chedi pole
poothaai modern ah
sona sona sona

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sona Sona Sona?

The song Sona Sona Sona celebrates love and the joy of being together, featuring playful lyrics that evoke a sense of fun and romance.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga, the song is a lively expression of the characters' romantic feelings, set against a backdrop of youthful adventures.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Armaan Malik and Varun Parandhaman, whose voices blend beautifully to create an energetic vibe.

Who composed the music for Sona Sona Sona?

The music for Sona Sona Sona was composed by D Imman, known for his catchy and vibrant compositions in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 14, 2015, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sona Sona Sona, the characters express their playful love through upbeat rhythms and catchy lyrics. The song encapsulates the joy of young romance, making it a perfect fit for celebratory moments. With its lively beats and engaging vocals, it invites listeners to dance and enjoy life. This vibrant track from Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga is sure to uplift spirits and create a festive atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sona Sona Sona from Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Armaan Malik and Varun Parandhaman. This catchy dance number, composed by D Imman, perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance and romance. Get ready to groove as this song elevates your spirits and sets the perfect mood for any party!
stanzaMeanings: break it down like this
Hey, come a little closer, come on, come on, let go of your worries and come here, come here, and say love.. come on.
Hey, I am your partner, come on, your mood is like a flower, come on, give me a kiss, come on.
You are like a flower in my garden, blooming beautifully and modern.
You are like my violin, today I feel love in my heart.
The heart of a girl in love is like an express train, waiting on the list, when will it confirm me?
Hey, come a little closer, come on, come on, let go of your worries and come here, come here, and say love.. come on.
When you come around, you make me lose my mind, girl. When you talk, I lose track of time.. I am losing time, girl.
You walk into my life and change it, girl. You are one of a kind, and you know it, girl. You are my dream girl, the love of my life.
Like a single tea, I am a very local guy. I am looking for coffee, two legs are going to the theater, and I will get a ticket. Now I am going to the multiplex.
The ringtone of my cellphone is now changed because of you. What else can I say? Silence is what I can say.
Hey, come a little closer, come on, come on, let go of your worries and come here, come here, and say love.. come on.
Hey, I am your partner, come on, your mood is like a flower, come on, give me a kiss, come on.
You are like a breath of fresh air, come on, say love, like a watch, you surround my feet.
Like a touch on a tablet screen, don’t touch me, my love is like a museum, it’s a history that speaks.
It’s not like before, love, what can I say?
Go away, you fool, I don’t want to follow you, go away, I don’t want to show an over-the-top film, go away.
I don’t want to look like this, go away, I don’t want your love, go away, just leave me alone.
You are like a flower in my garden, blooming beautifully and modern.
Sona sona sona
